overall.description: A smooth drone-style fly-around of the Montreal Olympic Stadium in a video game, showcasing its distinctive inclined tower and surrounding parkland with green lawns and water features under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete plaza alongside stadium tower base

agents.ego_description: flying slowly along the side of the stadium tower, maintaining a steady altitude parallel to the structure

entered.detail: massive inclined concrete tower with dark glass panels and cable stays
expansive white concrete surface surrounding the stadium base
dark tinted glass panels on the lower levels of the stadium structure
thin white support cables running from the tower to the stadium roof

segments.scene_description: The camera drifts slowly along the side of the Montreal Olympic Stadium's iconic inclined tower, showcasing the brutalist concrete architecture and dark glass facade against a bright blue sky. The scene is set on a wide concrete plaza with no visible pedestrians or vehicles.

events.description: camera pans left revealing the Olympic Stadium dome structure in the background

agents.ego_description: panning left to reveal the stadium dome while moving forward toward the tower base

entered.detail: large curved stadium roof structure visible in the distance
well-manicured green grass surrounding the concrete walkways
multi-story rectangular building visible behind the stadium dome

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal the distinctive dome of the Olympic Stadium in the background while moving toward the tower base. The ground transitions from concrete to green grass lawns, with a beige office building visible in the far left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pathway with water feature alongside stadium base

events.description: ground surface changes from grass to white paved pathway with water feature appearing on right

agents.ego_description: following a curved pathway around the stadium base, with the tower now on the left side of the frame

entered.detail: narrow reflecting pool or canal running parallel to the curved pathway
white concrete walking path curving around the stadium perimeter
dense line of green trees forming the park boundary in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a curved white pathway around the stadium base, with the inclined tower now positioned on the left. A water feature runs along the right side of the path, while green grass lawns and a distant tree line complete the park setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a close-up study of brutalist architecture into a wide, scenic view of the surrounding stadium parkland. It begins by drifting slowly along the side of the Montreal Olympic Stadium's inclined tower, highlighting the concrete textures and dark glass facade against a bright blue sky. As the camera pans left to reveal the stadium's distinctive dome, the movement shifts toward the tower's base and the ground transitions from a wide concrete plaza to lush green lawns. The scene then expands to follow a curved white pathway, with the tower now positioned to the left and a water feature appearing along the right. Finally, the perspective opens up to encompass the full park setting, complete with expansive grass and a distant tree line.
